title: guettarda stenophylla
intro: Guettarda stenophylla, also known as the "Pride of India," is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The Guettarda stenophylla plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Guettarda stenophylla can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
